name: Sweet & Sour Purple Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté for 1 minute, stirring occasionally.
3. Add cabbage and apples to the skillet. Sauté for an additional 3 minutes until vegetables begin to soften.
4. Stir in water, brown sugar, vinegar, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour mixture into a serving dish and cover with foil.
6. Cook on low heat for 20-25 minutes or until the cabbage is tender and the sauce has thickened slightly.
7. Sprinkle with caraway seeds if desired before serving.
Yield: 6 side-dish servings
